summary: Added 7 negative-path corpus manifest tests (malformed JSON, non-object root, missing case_id/target_file, unsupported mode as execution_error, missing directory, sorted discovery) and 8 artifact-contract drift-detection tests (wrong kind, schema_version, finding_count, rule_ids, failed_case_ids, extra/missing golden key, wrong new_rule_ids). 29 tests pass. Ruff and pre-commit clean.

notes: Pre-commit: passed (CRLF normalized on first run, clean on second).
Pyright errors in test files are pre-existing tmp_path/monkeypatch unknown-type debt — same pattern at lines 100-447 in original file.

reviewer_notes: No production code changed. Only test files and exec-plan updated.
Negative-path tests confirm exception types raised by load_corpus_manifest and execute_corpus_case.
Drift tests confirm each assertion helper in artifact_assertions.py raises AssertionError on wrong payloads.
